'''warogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ofer|ofer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ofer|ofer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| warogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæregeth|wæregeth]] || [[word:wæregej|wæregej]] || [[word:wæregesh|wæregesh]] || [[word:wærege|wærege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:warorogoth|warorogoth]] || [[word:warorogoj|warorogoj]] || [[word:warorogosh|warorogosh]] || [[word:warorogo|warorogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:warogoth|warogoth]] || [[word:warogoj|warogoj]] || [[word:warogosh|warogosh]] || [[word:warogo|warogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:warofgofth|warofgofth]] || [[word:warofgofj|warofgofj]] || [[word:warofgofsh|warofgofsh]] || [[word:warofgof|warofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:warogotho|warogotho]] || [[word:warogojo|warogojo]] || [[word:warogosho|warogosho]] || [[word:warogoko|warogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:warogoth|warogoth]] || [[word:warogoj|warogoj]] || [[word:warogosh|warogosh]] || [[word:warogo|warogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:warogothol|warogothol]] || [[word:warogojol|warogojol]] || [[word:warogoshol|warogoshol]] || [[word:warogokol|warogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:warogoothotho|warogoothotho]] || [[word:warogoojojo|warogoojojo]] || [[word:warogooshosho|warogooshosho]] || [[word:warogooko|warogooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:warogothon|warogothon]] || [[word:warogojon|warogojon]] || [[word:warogoshon|warogoshon]] || [[word:warogokon|warogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:warogothooro|warogothooro]] || [[word:warogojooro|warogojooro]] || [[word:warogoshooro|warogoshooro]] || [[word:warogokooro|warogokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
